free_text: Photoneutron angular distributions from the reaction
30 g mass was contained in a right-circular
aluminium disk 100 mm in diameter and 16 mm thick.
Flight path = 49.2 m at University  of  Toronto
Flight path = 10.0  m  at  Ottawa  Laboratories
The angular distribution of photoneutrons for the
reaction C-13(gamma,n0)C-12 was measured. At the
U. of Toronto linac the data were obtained for
bremsstrahlung end points of 12 MeV (at laboratory
Laboratories Linac the data were obtained for
bremsstrahlung end points of 18.4, 20.6 and 24.6 MeV
(at 8 angles in 14 degree steps from 48 degrees).
Data were compiled at  SCJAD  of  Saratov
